v(w)end,function(d,h)local v=p(h)local l=function(l,P)return x(d,{l;P},h,v)end return l end,function(d,h)local v=p(h)local l=function(l,P,J,o,w)return x(d,{l,P;J;o;w},h,v)end return l end,{},function(d)local h,x=-294979+294980,d[-81021-(-81022)]while x do K[x],h=K[x]-(-114875-(-114876)),h+(-704728+704729)if 348986-348986==K[x]then K[x],O[x]=nil,nil end x=d[h]end return(B(13357633-(-142918),{}))(v(w))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[h(685433+-720545)],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
